#  Delete Specification Section Revisions 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * Deleting a specification is permanent and cannot be recovered. This is to protect your current set of specifications from being overwritten with an older revision that could have otherwise been retrieved from the Recycle Bin.
  * If you select a specification sheet with multiple revisions, only the most recently published revision will be deleted.
  * If a specification sheet does not have a previously published revision, the entire specification sheet will be deleted.


##  Prerequisites 
  * If a specification section is linked to any items in Procore, you need to unlink the specification section before deleting it. See the Unlink a Specification Section below.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. _Optional:_ [Search and Filter Specifications.](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/search-for-and-filter-specifications)
#####  Tip
To delete an older revision, filter by the set where the revision was uploaded.
  3. Mark the checkboxes for the specifications you want to delete.
  4. Click **Delete.**
  5. Click **Delete** to confirm. 


#### To Unlink a Specification Section
  1. Click Info ![Icon Info3](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8daa3c2524fc6852f143ae85122ba667/6cc6417d2c59aeda0bd76d801eb8e870/icon-info3.png?fm=webp&h=16) icon next to the specification.
  2. Click the **Related Items** tab.
  3. Click **Edit**.
  4. Click the **delete** ![Icon Delete Cnvs](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8f66a8c060257b7065576be6666367d2/f5951d690a314ae20a7ab72f71c96e6c/icon-delete-cnvs.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon next to the item.


## See Also
  * [Delete a Specification Area](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/delete-a-specification-area)
  * [View the Deleted Specifications Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/view-deleted-specifications-report)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-specifications)
title: Delete Specification Section Revisions
description: How to delete spec section revisions from a project's specifications log.
